products.name: Silk Straight Lace Front Wig - Jet Black
products.description: Ultra-sleek silk straight lace front wig in jet black. 100% human hair with a natural hairline. Pre-plucked with baby hair for a seamless, undetectable finish. 20-26 inches.

products.name: Water Wave Wig - Chocolate Brown
products.description: Gorgeous water wave textured wig in rich chocolate brown. Lightweight, breathable cap with adjustable straps. Effortless beachy waves that hold their shape wash after wash.

products.name: Deep Wave Closure Wig - Natural Black
products.description: Luxurious deep wave 4x4 closure wig. Voluminous curls with zero frizz. Glueless design for quick, easy wear. Perfect for busy women who want effortless glamour.

products.name: Honey Blonde Bodywave Wig - 24 inch
products.description: Stunning honey blonde body wave wig, 24 inches of pure luxury. 27# color grade, pre-colored and ready to wear. HD lace melts into any skin tone. A showstopper.

products.name: Kinky Straight Wig - Off Black
products.description: Natural-looking kinky straight texture that mimics relaxed African hair. Blends seamlessly with your own edges. Lightweight and comfortable for all-day wear. 16-22 inches.

products.name: Peruvian Straight Bundles - Natural
products.description: Premium Peruvian straight hair bundles in natural black. 100% virgin human hair — colour, bleach, and style freely. Minimal shedding. Sold per bundle (100g), 14-30 inches.

products.name: Body Wave Clip-In Set - Dark Brown
products.description: Instant volume and length with this 7-piece body wave clip-in set. Blends naturally with your hair. Quick to apply, no salon needed. Reusable and heat-friendly.

products.name: Tape-In Extensions - Jet Black 20 inch
products.description: Professional-grade tape-in extensions in jet black, 20 inches. Thin, flat wefts that lie completely flat. Reusable up to 3 applications. 20 pieces per pack.

products.name: Frontal Piece - 13x4 Straight
products.description: 13x4 ear-to-ear lace frontal piece in straight texture. Free parting anywhere. Knots pre-bleached for a natural scalp appearance. Perfect for custom wig builds.

products.name: Silk Edge Control - Strong Hold
products.description: Keep your edges laid all day with this non-flaking, humidity-resistant edge control. Infused with argan oil to nourish while it holds. Works on natural hair and wigs.

products.name: Satin Bonnet - Oversized Black
products.description: Protect your wigs and natural hair overnight with this oversized satin bonnet. Elastic band that stays put without pulling. Keeps hair moisturised and frizz-free.

products.name: Wig Stand - Collapsible Travel
products.description: Portable collapsible wig stand for styling and storage. Lightweight and sturdy. Folds flat for travel. Keeps your wigs in shape between wears.
